# GO-BP Fisher enrichment and volcano plots
#
# DISABLED — Fisher over all genes is very slow (~hours for 123 genes).
# Uncomment the chunks below (and the child include in index.Rmd) when ready to run.

<!--
```{r fisher-enrichment}
fisher_results <- run_fisher_enrichment(
  scDiffCom_list = TARGET.scDiffComs,
  dataset_label  = TARGET_DATASET,
  output_dir     = WITHIN_COHORT_OUTPUT_DIR,
  LRI_GO_BP      = LRI_GO_BP,
  malignant_type = MALIGNANT_TYPE,
  min_go_size    = MIN_GO_SIZE,
  min_detected   = MIN_DETECTED,
  save_every     = SAVE_EVERY
)
```

```{r fisher-volcano}
plot_fisher_volcano(
  fisher_res      = fisher_results,
  selected_genes  = SELECTED_GENES,
  dataset_label   = TARGET_DATASET,
  output_dir      = WITHIN_COHORT_OUTPUT_DIR,
  p_adj_cutoff    = P_ADJ_CUTOFF,
  top_label_n     = TOP_LABEL_N,
  bold_go_terms   = BOLD_GO_TERMS
)
```
-->
